case_title: OK SOON KEY VS. COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY KEY, OK SOON AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/9/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KEY, OK SOON AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-03-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF OKSOON KEY APPEARED. DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY KEVIN HEUER, GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF FILED CASE 855277 BASED ON SAME CLAIMS AND JUDGMENT ON 7/12/17 WITH NO APPEAL. PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER IN 855277 POST JUDGMENT AND WAS DENIED ON 11/1/17. PLAINTIFF CAN NOT FILE SAME CLAIMS OVER AND OVER AGAINST SAID DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO. NOT REPORTED. (506)
